message:
style: rustfmt normalization for EWMA line joins and const string literal in flat_combining and e2e baselines

Purely mechanical formatting: rustfmt line-joining for the EWMA
fixed-point computation and disable-threshold check in flat_combining.rs,
and const string literal line joining in the UNIQUE email index perf
probe. No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
